notes.en: [[character:lyney]]'s [[ability:skill]] and [[ability:burst]] talent priority **largely depends on how often he uses his [[ability:burst]] and how many Prop Surplus stacks he gains per rotation.**
notes.fr: La priorité du [[ability:skill]] et [[ability:burst]] de [[character:lyney]] **dépends largement de la fréquence à laquelle il utilise son [[ability:burst]] et de combien de cumuls de fantasmagorie il gagne par rotation.**
notes.it: La priorità dei talenti di [[ability:skill]] e [[ability:burst]] **dipende in gran parte da quanto spesso [[character:lyney]] riesce ad utilizzare il suo [[ability:burst]] e da quanti accumuli di Riserva scenica riesce ad ottenere per rotazione**.
notes.ru: Приоритет развития талантов [[character:lyney]] во многом зависит от того, **как часто Лини использует [[ability:burst]] и сколько уровней Избыточного реквизита набирает за ротацию**.
